item.title: I'm a straight male, mostly white and mostly young. The folks giving up on politics disappoint me.
item.description: My friends' safety is not negotiable. Neither is the safety of the stranger I've never met. I wish there was an activist organisation nearby I could join.
item.dc:creator: HobbesTail

item.description: And you failed spectacularly!

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
pretty terrible coloring job by all
someone's gonna die
why doesn't my job do this
never seen this movie but the party looks lit
i'm calling the police
"describe your ideal backpack"
no need to brag
more cats as you look
wait what
olives are gross
as is tradition
mmm hmm
i knew it
i posted a similar meme with a penguin called 'pegin' and someone in the comments got pretty upset about it.. saying everyone should know the word penguin
money be used in exchange for goods and services
i guess
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: No.
item.description: No quarter for Nazis, racists, authoritarians and fascists. We're enemies, and we're not letting you get away with your crap.

item.title: Fuck kidney stones….
item.description: This is my 3rd time dealing with kidney stones… It sucks! On the upside, living in Japan healthcare is crazy affordable! X-rays, ultrasound test, a few more other medical tests, & 2 weeks of prescription painkillers cost me under $40! Have a great day on Imgur & Love from Japan!
item.dc:creator: Come2Japan

item.title: I have a feeling female gun ownership is about to skyrocket
item.description: In 2020 I had a lot of friend’s of friend’s contact me about getting a gun. On Wednesday I had people start contacting me again, mostly females. If any of you are good people have questions let me know and I’ll make more posts.
item.dc:creator: superscout0233

item.title: She got something to tell you. ..
item.description: Did ya get that thiiiiiiiiinnnnnnnnng I... SENT.....YOU ? Did you get that thing I sent you?
item.dc:creator: TheReturnOfMadJuan

item.title: Why him?!
item.description: I don't even know if this is anything I should post or not. Maybe I'll delete it after I wake up tomorrow. It really says it all. I got the news over 15 hours ago. My heart is torn apart, but I can't seem to shed a tear for more than a minute. I want to cry, but I can't. I loved him so much! Sorry, I just need to vent for people I don't know. I can't call anyone because everyone I know loved him as much as I do, and I've talked to a fair few of them on the phone today. Maybe this shout to strangers is the release I need. I don't know. I feel so fucking empty. I hate that I can't cry for him. He was the greatest person I've ever met. He welcomed me when I didn't feel like I had any friends. I've met the best people, thanks to him. And before anyone assumes anything, it was a workplace accident, and not self inflicted. Sorry for taking up your time. I need to vent. Go on with your day. I really do hope it's better than mine. EDIT: Thank you, everyone. You made me feel better about it, and not like a shit person. Thank you
item.dc:creator: Sigge1981
